user.title: Virtual Garage Cover Setup
user.description: Configure a cover for a single-button garage door motor (Open > Stop > Close > Stop cycle), controlled via a switch entity.

data_description.switch_entity: The switch that controls the motor. Each activation cycles: Open > Stop > Close > Stop.
data_description.travel_time: Time in seconds for a full travel from fully open to fully closed (or vice versa).
data_description.closed_sensor: Binary sensor that is active when the cover is fully closed. Used to calibrate position tracking.
data_description.open_sensor: Binary sensor that is active when the cover is fully open. Used to calibrate position tracking.
data_description.toggle_delay: Delay between rapid button presses for direction reversal (triple-press). Increase if your motor misses presses.

abort.already_configured: This switch is already configured as a Virtual Garage Cover.

data_description.travel_time: Time in seconds for a full travel from fully open to fully closed.
data_description.closed_sensor: Binary sensor that is active when the cover is fully closed.
data_description.open_sensor: Binary sensor that is active when the cover is fully open.
data_description.toggle_delay: Delay between rapid button presses for direction reversal.
